epic.title: Azure Cost Advisor (ACA) -- Phase 1 Commercial SaaS
epic.description: Azure Cost Advisor is a commercial SaaS product that helps Azure subscribers discover and act on cost-saving opportunities. Customers connect their subscription (delegated, service principal, or Lighthouse), the platform runs a 12-rule heuristic analysis, and delivers a tiered PDF/JSON findings report. Billing via Stripe. Stack: FastAPI + React 19 + Fluent UI v9 + Cosmos DB + Azure Container Apps + APIM + Stripe.

features.title: Foundation -- Repo Scaffold, Docker, CI, Health endpoints
features.description: Mono-repo layout: services/api (FastAPI), services/collector (ACA Job), services/analysis (ACA Job), services/delivery (ACA Job), frontend (Vite + React 19). docker-compose.yml for local dev. GitHub Actions CI. venv + requirements.txt. Health and readiness endpoints. Environment wiring (.env.example). Data model server (port 8011, isolated from EVA poc).

features.title: Collection -- MSAL Auth, Resource Graph, Cost Management pull
features.description: Three connection modes: Mode A (delegated MSAL), Mode B (service principal), Mode C (Azure Lighthouse). Resource Graph inventory query. Cost Management 91-day cost pull. Advisor recommendations pull. Pre-flight verdict engine (checks required permissions before committing a run). CollectorJob ACA Job.

features.title: Analysis -- 12-rule heuristic engine, FindingsAssembler
features.description: 12 heuristic rules covering: idle VMs, orphaned disks, oversized SKUs, reserved instance opportunities, untagged resources, idle App Service Plans, over-provisioned Cosmos throughput, unused Public IPs, legacy storage SKUs, unattached managed disks, dev/test licensing gaps, advisor score gaps. FindingsAssembler aggregates per-rule results. AnalysisRun tracking in Cosmos. CAD/USD savings estimates.

features.title: API -- FastAPI service: auth, collection, billing, admin, APIM
features.description: FastAPI routers: auth (connect/preflight/disconnect), collect (start/status), reports (tier1), billing (checkout/portal/stripe-webhook), entitlements (GET), admin (kpis/customers/grant/lock/reconcile/runs/audit). APIM integration with entitlement cache policy (60s TTL). Pydantic models. Cosmos repos. JWT validation middleware.

features.title: Frontend -- React 19, Fluent UI v9, 10 Spark screens
features.description: Vite + React 19 + Fluent UI v9 + Spark design system. createBrowserRouter. RequireAuth + RequireRole guards. CustomerLayout + AdminLayout. 5 customer screens: LoginPage, ConnectSubscriptionPage, CollectionStatusPage, FindingsTier1Page, UpgradePage. 5 admin screens: AdminDashboardPage, AdminCustomersPage, AdminBillingPage, AdminRunsPage, AdminControlsPage. WCAG 2.1 AA. i18next wiring.

features.title: Billing -- Stripe Checkout, Webhook lifecycle, Entitlements
features.description: Stripe Checkout sessions: Tier 2 one-time ($499 CAD), Tier 2 subscription ($150/mo), Tier 3 ($1499 CAD). Stripe webhook handler (checkout.session.completed, invoice.payment_succeeded, customer.subscription.deleted). EntitlementService: grant, revoke, lock. PaymentsRepo + StripeCustomerMapRepo in Cosmos. Entitlement cache via APIM policy.

features.title: Delivery -- Jinja2 templates, ZIP packager, Blob SAS URLs
features.description: Delivery service: Jinja2 HTML/PDF templates for 12 finding types. ZIP packager (findings JSON + PDF + CSV). Blob Storage upload (deliverables container). 24-hour SAS URL generation. SHA-256 artifact verification. DeliveryJob ACA Job.

features.title: Observability -- App Insights, Log Analytics, GA4, Clarity
features.description: Structured JSON logging (structlog). Application Insights SDK integration. Log Analytics workspace queries. APIM usage metrics. GA4 event taxonomy (per analytics-spec.md: onboarding, collection, report, conversion funnel). Microsoft Clarity session replay. Consent Mode v2 (GTM). Privacy-first: no PII in analytics.

features.title: i18n and a11y -- 5 locales, multi-currency, WCAG 2.1 AA
features.description: i18next 5 locales: en, fr-CA, pt-BR, es, de. Multi-currency display: CAD, USD, BRL, EUR. ConsentBanner component. WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. axe-core CI gate (zero violations on critical paths). aria-live regions for async status updates.

features.title: Hardening -- APIM cache, rate limiting, idempotency, PIPEDA
features.description: APIM entitlement cache (60s, per analytics-spec.md policy XML). Pre-flight caching. Rate limiting (per subscription). Idempotency keys on POST endpoints. Webhook Stripe-Signature validation. PIPEDA soft-delete (subscriptions + analysis runs). Penetration testing checklist. CSP headers.

features.title: Phase 2 Infra -- Terraform private landing zone, Lighthouse Mode C
features.description: Terraform private landing zone (VNET, Private Endpoints for Cosmos + Blob + APIM). Customer-managed VNET option. Azure Lighthouse Mode C (cross-tenant delegated access). BYO subscription onboarding wizard. Phase 2 bootstrap.sh extension.

features.title: Data Model -- ACA model server (port 8011), WBS tracking
features.description: ACA-isolated data model server: ports 8011, MODEL_DIR=51-ACA/data-model/model, no Cosmos/Redis, pure MemoryStore. 27 endpoints, 11 containers, 10 screens, 12 epics seeded. Veritas plan + trust score tracking. start.ps1 bootstrap. README maintained as living doc. Separate from EVA POC data model (port 8010).

user_stories.title: [ACA-S01] Repo scaffold + docker-compose + health endpoint verified
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: mono-repo layout created; docker-compose up starts api+frontend; GET /health returns {status:ok}; CI passes.

evidence.notes: scaffold complete; health route implemented; docker-compose wired.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S02] Data model server on port 8011 seeded -- 27 endpoints, 11 containers, 10 screens
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: start.ps1 boots server; POST /model/admin/seed loads JSON; agent-summary returns total>=57; zero BOM errors.

evidence.notes: start.ps1 created; seed confirmed total=57; BOM stripped from all JSON.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S03] ADO project 51-aca created -- ado-artifacts.json + ado-import.ps1
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: ADO project exists at dev.azure.com/marcopresta/51-aca; Epic + 12 Features + 24 PBIs imported; sprints Sprint-1 through Sprint-3 created.

evidence.notes: ado-artifacts.json created. Pending: az devops project create + ado-import.ps1 run.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S04] Mode A delegated MSAL auth -- POST /v1/auth/connect implemented
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: POST /v1/auth/connect with MSAL device-code or redirect flow; token stored in Cosmos sessions container; 401 on invalid token; pre-flight verdict returned.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S05] Resource Graph + Cost Management collector job implemented
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: CollectorJob reads subscriptionId from job payload; runs Resource Graph inventory query; pulls 91-day cost data; stores raw JSON to Cosmos analysis_runs; exits 0.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S06] 12-rule heuristic analysis engine -- AnalysisJob exits 0 with findings
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: AnalysisJob reads raw inventory from Cosmos; runs all 12 rules; writes findings JSON with savingsEstimateCAD per finding; exits 0; FindingsAssembler produces tier1/tier2/tier3 splits.

evidence.notes: services/analysis scaffolded; rules not yet written.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S07] GET /v1/reports/tier1 returns findings for authenticated subscriber
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: JWT validated; subscriptionId resolved; findings read from Cosmos; MoneyRangeBar + EffortBadge fields present in response; 404 if no run exists.

evidence.notes: router stub exists; Cosmos read pending.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S08] Admin endpoints -- kpis, customers, grant, lock, reconcile, runs all return 200
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 6 admin endpoints return correct schema; role check for ACA_Admin/ACA_Support/ACA_FinOps; _write_audit() fires for grant+lock+reconcile; 403 on wrong role.

evidence.notes: admin.py fully rewritten with Pydantic models + _write_audit() helper.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S09] Stripe checkout + webhook + entitlements flow end-to-end
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: POST /v1/billing/checkout creates Stripe session; webhook validates Stripe-Signature; on checkout.completed entitlement written to Cosmos; GET /v1/entitlements returns tier+validUntil.

evidence.notes: router stubs exist; Stripe SDK integration pending.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S10] APIM entitlement cache policy deployed -- 60s TTL, tier gating template
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: apim-entitlements-policy.xml applied to GET /v1/entitlements operation; cache hit on second call within 60s; 400 returned when subscriptionId missing.

evidence.notes: apim-entitlements-policy.xml created; deployment to APIM pending.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S11] 5 customer-facing Spark screens -- LoginPage through UpgradePage
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 5 screens render; RequireAuth redirects unauthenticated users to /login; ConnectSubscriptionPage Mode A/B/C radio works; CollectionStatusPage polls with exponential backoff; FindingsTier1Page shows findings table; UpgradePage shows tier cards.

evidence.notes: All 5 pages created: LoginPage, ConnectSubscriptionPage, CollectionStatusPage, FindingsTier1Page, UpgradePage.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S12] 5 admin Spark screens -- AdminDashboard through AdminControls
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 5 admin screens render; RequireRole(ACA_Admin/Support/FinOps) guards applied; ConfirmModal blocks destructive actions; AuditedBanner appears post-action; deep-link ?subscriptionId= auto-loads runs.

evidence.notes: All 5 admin pages created: AdminDashboardPage, AdminCustomersPage, AdminBillingPage, AdminRunsPage, AdminControlsPage.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S13] Phase 1 infrastructure -- Cosmos + Container Apps + ACR deployed via bootstrap.sh
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: bootstrap.sh MODE=phase1 exits 0; 11 Cosmos containers created; 3 ACA Jobs registered; UAMI created with KV + ACR RBAC; APIM imported.

evidence.notes: bootstrap.sh created; pending real Azure run in marco* sandbox.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S14] GA4 + Clarity instrumentation -- analytics-spec.md events firing
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All events in analytics-spec.md taxonomy fire on correct user actions; no PII in event parameters; Consent Mode v2 blocks analytics until user accepts; Clarity masks PII fields.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S15] Delivery service -- ZIP packager + Blob SAS URL + SHA-256 verification
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: DeliveryJob produces ZIP with findings JSON + PDF; uploads to deliverables Blob container; returns 24h SAS URL; SHA-256 in response; download verified by client.

evidence.notes: services/delivery stub exists; Jinja2 templates + packager pending.

user_stories.title: [ACA-S16] Veritas trust score >= 0.50 -- EVA-STORY tags in source files
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: node 48-eva-veritas/src/cli.js audit --repo 51-ACA reports MTI >= 50; all 22 stories tagged with # EVA-STORY: <ID> in corresponding source files or evidence receipts.

evidence.notes: Current MTI=0; veritas-plan.json uses old code-structure format; needs story tagging sprint.
